name: HUMAN
passive: Gain 20% damage reduction and 20% damage boost when below 50% hp.

name: DARK ELF
passive: An 8% chance to apply a random debuff to the opponent when hitting them.

name: DRAGON BLOODED
passive: Gain 30% Warding and 10 Protection alongside 100% Heat and Cold Resistance.

name: ORK
passive: Weapon arts gain 10 armor penetration. +0.2 Tenacity and for each active buff you gain an additional +0.1 tenacity.

name: ARBORIAN
passive: -50% Fire Defense, +15 Protection, passive regen that is boosted in the sun, and a chance to entangle foes on hit.

name: KITSUNE
passive: Gain +2 Jump Boost, 10% Movement Speed and +10% Attack Speed.

name: BUNIKIN
passive: Gain +5 Jump Boost and Gain dodge chance based on Jump Boost, when you dodge with the passive you gain a 100% chance to crit for one attack.
